meaning: adj.荣誉的,名誉的,(债务的)道义上的
examples: Harvard awarded him an honorary degree.
An honorary degree was conferred on him by Oxford University in 2001.
The United States bestowed honorary citizenship upon England's World War II prime minister, Sir Winston Churchill.
He also has been awarded honorary doctorate degrees from URI and Hobart and William Smith Colleges.
That appears to describe Mr Havelange, who is 95 and is FIFA's honorary president.
